programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sex Slaves in Texas
programme.desc: Alfonso Diaz-Juarez is accused of kidnapping young women from Mexico and forcing them into prostitution in Houston cantinas.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Sacrament of Blood
programme.desc: Behind the cloak of his 'religion,' a Santeria priest allegedly murdered his lover, raped a minor and molested his step-daughter.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Brutal Obsession
programme.desc: A rejected abusive boyfriend stalks his ex and mother of his child, trapping and killing her at her workplace. A 61 year-old grandmother is raped by a 37 year-old after being lured into his dungeon-like home.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder
programme.desc: A man is found dead on his living room floor, three decades later his case remains open. A detective is determined to pin the crime on the man's roommate.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traces of Truth
programme.desc: A high school gym teacher took time off from class to give his friend a ride home -- and never returned. Investigators suspected foul play, but without a body the case would be difficult to prove.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl is killed by her mother and father in her own home. The parents say they acted in self-defence but the forensic evidence indicates otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: If Looks Could Kill
programme.desc: Model Tara Lambert gets a hitman to kill her husband's ex and put her in a woodchipper, unaware that cameras were rolling.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Shopping With a Killer
programme.desc: 8-year-old Cherish Perrywinkle is lured out of a Walmart by a registered sex offender, but that’s just the beginning of a night of terror, all caught on camera.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Expedition X: Curse of the Old West Outlaw
programme.desc: Josh Gates' team heads west to investigate America's most haunted town. Locals claim the spirit of a notorious bandit spooks the town because of a wrongful hanging. Phil and Jess' investigation leads them into a dangerous abandoned gold mine.

programme.title: Expedition X: Terror on Doll Island
programme.desc: Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot power through camera malfunctions and emotional breakdowns in order to find an explanation of what is happening on the Island of the Dolls, a dangerous place that locals have long avoided.

programme.title: Expedition X: Devil in the Forest
programme.desc: After receiving brand-new, frightening reports, Josh Gates sends Jessica and Phil to the woods of southern New Jersey to hunt for the infamous Jersey Devil. Locals are terrified by a demonic creature that's terrorized them for more than 300 years.

programme.title: Expedition X: Uncovered: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: Phil and Jessica catch wind of human activity surrounding an ancient city and head deep into the Cambodian jungle to find a monster that's been terrifying locals for years.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Merry Josh-mas
programme.desc: Josh is in the holiday spirit with star of 'A Christmas Story' Peter Billingsley, actress Judy Greer of 'Uncle Frank' and 'The Wedding Planner' as well as Reginald VelJohnson of 'Die Hard.' Josh also visits Santa's Village.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Curse of the Golden Bell
programme.desc: Josh joins local divers in the Southeast Asian country of Myanmar to search for the ancient cursed Golden Bell of King Dhammazedi. To recover it, Josh dives into murky, violent waters that have claimed the lives of other divers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Merry Josh-mas
programme.desc: Josh is in the holiday spirit with star of 'A Christmas Story' Peter Billingsley, actress Judy Greer of 'Uncle Frank' and 'The Wedding Planner' as well as Reginald VelJohnson of 'Die Hard.' Josh also visits Santa's Village.

programme.title: Expedition X: America's Lake Monster
programme.desc: When Josh Gates receives new, potential video proof of a giant creature living in Lake Champlain, he sends Phil and Jess to investigate the 30-foot serpent that's been spotted in the lake for generations. A dangerous dive uncovers new evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Spanish Fortune, Found!
programme.desc: Josh travels the coast of Florida and to the newly opened country of Cuba in search of sunken treasure from a fleet of Spanish ships sunk in 1715. The hunt takes him deep into the Atlantic and into the previously sealed National Archives of Cuba.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Finding Fenn's Fortune
programme.desc: Josh Gates joins the hunt for a $2,000,000 treasure. He attempts to decode the clues of the modern day treasure's location by following a cryptic poem, leading him deep into the harsh Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Giants of the North
programme.desc: See how tourists explore the far reaches of northern Canada and gain exclusive access to polar bears on custom-built rovers, and how the Twin Otter aircraft drops much needed supplies to isolated villages.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Goliath Below Zero
programme.desc: Experts use a cutting-edge, all-terrain engineering marvel to access a perilous job site covered in snow; special insider access reveals how this modern marvel helps get the job done.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Hi-Tech Mega Marvels
programme.desc: A special drone uses technology to fly deep into treacherous, hard-to-reach mountains on dangerous search and rescue missions, and a hi-tech ice machine works tirelessly at a Toronto airport to keep flights running in brutal conditions.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Arctic's Toughest
programme.desc: The world's only actual all-terrain vehicle is an Arctic mega monster that can conquer land, snow, and water in dangerous conditions; elsewhere in avalanche country, only one machine can climb deadly mountains and protect a major highway.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Monster of the Arctic
programme.desc: When melting ice threatens to flood a town, a 22-ton amphibious mega machine battles the elements to save the day; in the Arctic, the Canadian Air Force relies on a massive transport aircraft to deliver supplies and personnel to far-off places.

programme.title: Extreme Ice Machines: Subzero Special Ops
programme.desc: Military search and rescue efforts in deadly arctic conditions rely on a specialized helicopter with unrivaled power and endurance, and special access reveals how it works; in the Alps, a monster snow blower keeps trains running in dangerous weather.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Saint Croix Swipe
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson try to repo two planes from a much-feared criminal. Meanwhile, Mike Kennedy's on a mission to repo a plane being stripped by a stolen-parts ring. And Kevin Lacey gets cozy with a debtor in order to swipe his classic jet.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Diving for Repos
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike Kennedy goes underwater to seize a seaplane. Meanwhile, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson chase a debtor who's fooling them with phony flight plans.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lacey's Story
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success. She must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Bettie Jo's Story
programme.desc: At just 24, Bettie Jo is eating her way towards 700 pounds. Housebound, she is reliant on her husband for even basic needs. Bettie Jo's future relies on her losing weight and her husband losing his fear that if she loses weight she will leave him.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Pauline's Story
programme.desc: At nearly 700 lbs., 51-year-old Pauline has an addiction to food that is killing her and taking over the life of her son, who is the primary caretaker.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chad's Story
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Chad's weight is dangerously out of control. After gastric bypass surgery, he quickly sheds pounds but faces a medical crisis when he does not follow the doctor's orders. In dire straits, Chad puts his weight-loss journey on the line.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: June's Story
programme.desc: June is 600 pounds, and copes with the tragic death of her son by eating. After gastric bypass surgery, she must confront the emotional issues driving her food compulsion. If she can stay on track, she can become the mother she desperately wants to be.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: June, Chad, and Pauline
programme.desc: Pauline's self-destructive behavior continues to be a problem. Chad strives to be a better father and husband as he continues his journey. June's progress stalls after frequent travel and wedding plans lead her to slip back into bad habits.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chad's Story
programme.desc: At 700 pounds, Chad's weight is dangerously out of control. After gastric bypass surgery, he quickly sheds pounds but faces a medical crisis when he does not follow the doctor's orders. In dire straits, Chad puts his weight-loss journey on the line.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: June, Chad, and Pauline

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Home for the Holidays?
programme.desc: The holidays are here, and the family prays for a Christmas miracle -- that Awesome Dawsyn can finally leave the hospital and come home. When the Derricos' wish comes true, however, they face a challenge far greater than they're ready for.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Dawsyn's settled at home, but it's just a matter of time before the final surgery, and tensions are high. Splitting responsibilities has Karen questioning whether she and Dawsyn are getting the support they need. Meanwhile, GG drops a bomb about Darian.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Entourage Sabotage
programme.desc: Sometimes, a bride's entourage is bossy instead of helpful. Tenisha wants lots of bling, but her bridesmaids insist on other styles. Elyse's mom demands she try on a pink ball gown. Adriana's family argues over the length of her hem.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is a Randy Situation

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: We've Got a Lot of Catching Up to Do!

programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Crickets
programme.desc: The perfect place to film an IJ challenge. The customers after consuming Q's hot dog smoothie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Unmotivational Speaker
programme.desc: Find out which classic Joker’s lines are still being uttered and which of the Alma Mater’s gets mentioned. Plus, what inspired tonight’s punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Total Bellas: Bellas Break Free

programme.title: Total Bellas: A Bella Babymoon

programme.title: Total Bellas: A Bella Babyshower
programme.desc: The Bella babymoon in Flagstaff comes to an end, and Brie and Nicole disagree with their mom on who should be invited to their baby shower. Nicole's sexual frustration causes her to act out in surprising ways, including pregnant skinny dipping.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Long Shot
programme.desc: Simmons, Parker and Robertson catch sportsmen who fired from inside their truck. Spahr leads the search for a missing elderly woman in York County. The dive team is mustered to search for two duck hunters presumed drowned in the Sebasticook River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Squirrel Shakedown
programme.desc: Sgt. Hawks and Officer Benvenuti supervise Trainee Frye's lobster trap detail. Officer Lucas and Trainee McDermott deal with a woman illegally keeping a wild squirrel. Officer Delisle and Biologist Marchand investigate the deaths of multiple turtles.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Bait and Switch
programme.desc: Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of illegally baiting deer. On Mount Kearsarge, two officers help rescue an injured hiker. Later, Sergeant Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a trapped bear cub.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Leading the Way
programme.desc: Sgt. Pushee leads a multi-agency rescue mission to find a missing kayaker. A specialist is called in to locate a pesky bear roaming a residential area, and a boy is caught riding without a helmet and operating his ATV illegally.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Operation Mountain Rescue
programme.desc: Enhanced content form the show North Woods Law.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Dogs
programme.desc: Excited hunters are in the woods because spring turkey hunting season has arrived. Laflamme investigates whether someone may have poached a hen. Spahr responds to a call where a girl was attacked by a dog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: 24 Hours on the Job
programme.desc: Follow several wardens during a busy 24 hours as they patrol for poachers, tag black bears at night, search for a home invader with a K9 team, and respond to a search and rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Cold and Fast
programme.desc: Mainers are racing to get their boats out on the water, while the wardens search for an elusive suspect in a jet ski hit-and-run. Also, a mysterious man arrives in Maine just after the Boston Marathon bombings and leaves a suicide note.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glamorous Glamping Retreat
programme.desc: The team leaves their tents behind and head to New Jersey to build a campers retreat for an outdoor-loving couple. With a screened-in porch, a floating barbecue deck, and a cozy hanging bed, this Adirondack style tree-cabin puts glamping in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Jeffersonian Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: Pete and his patriots descend upon Virginia for the first time to bring the treehouse revolution to Bella Rose Plantation. Drawing on the architectural innovations of Thomas Jefferson, Pete designs a luxurious two-story treehouse with colonial columns.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Alaskan Mountain Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete travels to Alaska to build a mountaineering lodge in the shadow of North America's highest peak, constructing an A-Framed masterpiece for the Mt. McKinley Princess Wilderness Lodge with breathtaking views of Denali.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Mountainside Bulldog Bungalow
programme.desc: A dog-loving couple dreams of a treehouse that will recapture mountain vistas. Pete and team raise the 'ruff' on a beautiful bulldog bungalow that offers a bounty of outdoor decks and loads of large windows to take in a view that was once lost.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse Utopia
programme.desc: Pete partners up in Utopia, TX for his first-ever joint venture: a treehouse B&B built for romance.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Double Treehouse Extravaganza
programme.desc: Pete builds two treehouses at the same time. In Maine, a couple wants a magical treehouse that evokes a famous children's book, with a grown-up twist. In Massachusetts, NTS raises the curtain on a whimsical Tudor-style theatre treehouse.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Shaq Takes it to the Trees!
programme.desc: It's a slam dunk when Pete builds an all-star speakeasy for basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal. The ball is in Pete's court to design a decagonal structure with a soaring 25 ft high ceiling and extra wide stairs to accommodate Shaq and his size 22 shoes.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon become greenhorn old miners and head to Alaska to dig for gold in hopes of striking it big to save themselves from financial ruin.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Kelewang
programme.desc: First, signature blades must be crafted from drill bits and mild steel chunks. Two rounds later, the final smiths must return to their home forges to recreate the legendary Indonesian sword, the Kelewang.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Rock-Throwing Crossbow
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths honour the forge's legendary power hammer Big Blu by ripping it apart and forging competition choppers. After two exhaustive rounds, two remaining smiths head home to recreate one of history's most unique hunting weapons.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Foot Artillery Sword
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge blades from old toys using the san mai technique. Playtime is over when the pressure heats up and the smiths experience difficult delaminations. The two finalists are tasked with recreating the M1832 Foot Artillery Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Baby Boomers vs Gen Z
programme.desc: The Baby Boomers take on Gen Z in a competition of old versus new. When the dust settles, two smiths will be tasked with recreating China's ancient Sword of Goujian.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: M1905 Springfield Bayonet
programme.desc: Four smiths must use their math skills to determine how much steel they need to make their signature blades. After several rounds, two smiths return home to build the intricate M1905 Springfield Bayonet.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Giant Sword of William Wallace
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths are asked with scaling down a nine-foot dagger to a fifth of its size. After intense testing, four competitors forge the William Wallace sword, the largest sword in the show's history.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Boateng Saber
programme.desc: In this unique competition, four smiths must pay in order to use tools needed to make signature blades. After two rounds, the competitors are tasked with recreating the Boateng Saber.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Partizan
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must dismantle a forge and use the steel to construct a blade. The competition is intense with the smiths struggling to salvage enough material to make a san mai billet. The two finalists must recreate the elegant Partizan.

programme.title: American Pickers: American Dream

programme.title: Movie: The Double Man

programme.title: Movie: Where Eagles Dare
programme.desc: A military officer with knowledge of the D-Day operation must be rescued from the Nazis.

programme.title: Movie: Vertigo
programme.desc: A web of obsession and deceit unfolds when Scottie Ferguson, a retired detective, falls in love with Madeleine, the wife of an old college friend. She has hired him to follow her, resulting in a tragic death because of his crippling fear of heights.

programme.title: Movie: Marnie
programme.desc: A habitual thief uses her looks to gain the confidence of her employers before robbing them and changing her identity. Her life takes an unexpected turn after her new boss catches her in the act and blackmails her into marriage.

programme.title: Movie: The Trouble With Harry
programme.desc: Trouble ensues in a small New England town when a corpse is discovered in the woods. Soon, everyone in town thinks that they had something to do with the death and they all conspire to hide the dead man.

programme.title: Movie: The Man Who Knew Too Much
programme.desc: A family vacationing in Morocco accidentally stumbles upon an assassination plot and the conspirators are determined to prevent them from interfering.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: A musician's life is almost ruined by bad evidence when he is falsely accused of robbery.

programme.title: Movie: North by Northwest
programme.desc: An advertising executive is mistaken for a government agent. The enemy spies pursue him all across North America. Also, the police officers suspect him of murder.

programme.title: Movie: Night Nurse
programme.desc: A nurse discovers that the wealthy children she's caring for are murder targets.

programme.desc: A daredevil pilot secures a job protecting a shady smuggler from his many enemies.

programme.title: Movie: Angel Face
programme.desc: A young woman with a murderous heart becomes obsessed with killing her stepmother.

programme.title: Movie: Sworn Enemy
programme.desc: A law student finds himself involved in a plot to catch a dangerous crook.

programme.title: Movie: Downstairs
programme.desc: A rogue chauffeur blackmails a Baroness and seduces her head cook to get her life savings.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track
programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Disorder in the Court
programme.desc: Levi's Dad, Garrett, returns from prison, but Raven, Chelsea and the kids are dismayed to discover that he has stolen Chelsea's invention.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Bah Humbugged
programme.desc: The Baxter-Carter-Grayson clan is in the holiday spirit, but Booker and Nia are at odds over new versus old family traditions. Raven and Garrett butt heads in the kitchen.

programme.title: Jessie: We Don't Need No Stinkin' Badges
programme.desc: Jessie offers to help Zuri earn Butterfly Scout troop badges during a Central Park camping trip. Meanwhile, Luke convinces Ravi that lying is a super power.

programme.title: Jessie: Panic Attack Room

programme.title: Raven's Home: Cali Dreams

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights

programme.title: Stuck in the Middle: Stuck at Christmas

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Joy-to-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv invites her 'Voltage' director and crew over for the Rooney's traditional Christmas Eve dinner but is forced to enlist Artie's help to prepare the famed meal. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow's gift exchange takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Cali Christmas-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie is upset that she can’t be in Wisconsin for Christmas and to cheer her up, Liv plans an incredible surprise. Meanwhile, Joey participates in a Mr. North Pole Santa Claus pageant against an old foe.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Most Interesting Mom in the World

programme.title: Raven's Home: Winners and Losers

programme.title: Jessie: Spaced Out

programme.title: Jessie: From the White House to Our House

programme.title: Bunk'd: Who da Boss? Lou da Boss!

programme.title: Raven's Home: Baking Bad

programme.title: Snapped: Catherine Hamborsky
programme.desc: A mysterious bar fire reveals a murder and one woman’s desperation to cover up her secret addiction.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracy Lawson
programme.desc: After a deadly fight, a mother’s secrets are exposed but she has a few surprises for the jury.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Cold December Morning
programme.desc: Devoted to her faith and her five children, Chanin Starbuck was recently divorced and starting life over. After she was brutally murdered, the investigation revealed secrets. The case divided a family. Could a jury unite on the truth?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Inside the Episode: A Mother's Dying Wish
programme.desc: Featuring insights from Kelly Siegler and behind-the-scenes facts.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Inside the Episode: Backwater Bloodshed
programme.desc: Featuring insights from Kelly Siegler and behind-the-scenes facts.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: He was a firefighter used to rescuing others. Now he was the one in desperate need of help. He found his wife bloodied and motionless on the bedroom floor. Could he save her in time? It was a chilling crime with no shortage of potential suspects.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unspeakable
programme.desc: Sandra and Jamie Melgar were high school sweethearts who were celebrating their 32nd anniversary. Then, the intimate evening turned deadly. To crack the case, investigators had to uncover the secrets of an illusion worthy of the great Houdini.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Watcher
programme.desc: Lauren Giddings was smart, charismatic and a newly-minted law school graduate. She had dreams of becoming a public defender, then she was brutally murdered. Her killer tried to pull off the perfect crime, but a secret recording exposed the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Lori Vallow: A Mother’s Madness
programme.desc: After devout, LDS mother Lori Vallow encounters a doomsday author, she descends down a path of darkness into a dangerous cult. The result is a trail of broken lives and dead bodies... including two of Vallow's own children.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: No Body, No Justice
programme.desc: A Connecticut town is rocked when mother-of-five Jennifer Dulos disappears. The main suspect in her murder, her husband, uses his wealth to gain leniency and derail the case, before a shocking twist.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Friend or Foe?
programme.desc: A young veteran from Georgia mysteriously disappears after a bipolar episode. When the case goes cold, Nancy Grace joins the investigation and ensures a conviction, but an unexpected plea deal may hide the truth and prevent justice from being served.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Killer in the Weeds
programme.desc: A young woman's body is found by her own father, in a park near their home in Queens. After DNA evidence helps the NYPD lock in on a suspect, a judge's decision to suppress evidence leads to a mistrial, jeopardizing a possible conviction.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murders and Mistrials
programme.desc: A young couple is murdered in Knoxville, TN, their bodies found brutally tortured. The family's suffering doesn't end there, as they soon learn that a corrupt judge may prevent the five, evil perpetrators from being brought to justice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Mansion Massacre
programme.desc: When a quadruple homicide is discovered in the ashes of a D.C. mansion fire, a small piece of evidence points to a monster with a grudge, a violent past, and a long rap sheet. A nationwide manhunt ensues to finally bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Imposter Injustice
programme.desc: After a beloved family man is murdered in a small, Midwest town, cops try to find his missing wife before she meets the same fate. When another homicide occurs, despite a 911 tip with the killer's location, it seems justice may never be served.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder at Fort Hood
programme.desc: In April of 2020, Pfc. Vanessa Guillén goes missing. The Army shuts her loved ones out of the investigation, so her family hires a private search team. When a different soldier is found murdered, it begs the question: What is going on at Fort Hood?

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Murder and Immunity
programme.desc: When newlyweds disappear on the night of a family birthday, everyone fears the worst. The case then takes an unexpected turn when cops discover the husband had an illegal drug business and his associates likely hold the key to that fateful night.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Taste for Blood
programme.desc: When North Dakota State Troopers arrive at a fatal car crash, the gory scene leaves them questioning whether it was by accident or intentional. After interviewing the lone survivor, a terrifying history of violence and death is uncovered.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Lunney
programme.desc: An elderly woman’s death leads to shocking revelations about her daughter’s double life.

programme.title: Snapped: Chyann Bratcher
programme.desc: A mysterious death leads one family into troubled waters as they search for justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Vonlee Nicole Titlow
programme.desc: After an alcoholic millionaire dies of seemingly natural causes, an unexpected betrayal reveals there may be more to the victim's death, and to his beautiful party-girl niece, than first meets the eye.

programme.title: Movie: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: Former villain Gru reconnects with his long-lost and far more successful twin brother Dru for one last heist: stealing a diamond from another supervillain, former child star Balthazar Bratt who is obsessed with the character that he played in his youth.

programme.title: Movie: The Grinch

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Hawkening: Look Who's Hawking Now

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: BattleBots: Return of the Bots
programme.desc: Hard-hitting, steel-splitting combat returns as 60 teams converge for a tournament of all-out robotic carnage! Jack Barker from End Game finally gets the match he's been waiting for as he squares off with Ray Billings and his lethal bot Tombstone.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: California's Hidden Doomsday
programme.desc: Rob Nelson heads to California to investigate a network for major fault lines that could set off an unprecedented mega-quake. Then, he explores a mysterious sinkhole that some believe is an endless pit to the center of the Earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Tesla's Final Secrets
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla died before he finished a mysterious, earth-shattering invention, but the ground beneath his only remaining lab might hold clues. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns are the first to use cutting-edge tech to investigate Tesla's underground secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Doomsday Volcano Mystery
programme.desc: A massive supervolcano beneath Naples, Italy may be on the verge of erupting again; Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns investigate this disturbing new evidence.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Rocky Mountain Monsters
programme.desc: Rob examines a set of bizarre markings that suggest a violent clash between prehistoric beasts. In California, he investigates if a strange lake is a home to alien life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Legend of the Nazi Gold
programme.desc: A legendary train filled with stolen Nazi gold is said to be hidden in Poland. Using cutting-edge technology, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns explore deep underneath the earth's surface and in abandoned Nazi tunnels in search for the infamous legend.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: King Solomon's Treasures
programme.desc: Priceless gold and silver artifacts are believed to be in the fabled lost Temple Treasures of Jerusalem and King Solomon's hidden mines. With unprecedented access, Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use the latest technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Quest for the Gold Rush Fortune
programme.desc: Millions of dollars of stolen Gold Rush treasure is rumored to have been stashed in a cave in Northern California. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to search for the legendary treasure.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Secret History of the New World
programme.desc: Rob investigates a cluster of ancient ruins in New England that suggest Europeans arrived in the Americas almost 1,000 years before Columbus. Then, he heads to California where a dormant super volcano may be showing new signs of life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: America's Buried Massacre
programme.desc: Rob hunts for a legendary mass grave that could expose a dark secret of America's industrial past. High in the mountains, a giant lake is mysteriously disappearing, and Rob uses cutting-edge technology to find out why.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: American Monster: Backyard Daddy
programme.desc: In Ogden, Utah, Stephen and Becky Vargas appear to have it all. Behind the picture perfect life seen in these rare home videos, jealousy and control issues are abound. But no one thought their marriage would end - in murder.

programme.title: American Monster: Alabama Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When a man is struck down by a mysterious sickness, the entire town grieves but when his daughter also falls ill, the family becomes suspicious.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blood on the Bed
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Byron Edwards is found brutally stabbed in his home, his family is absolutely devastated. But as detectives work to find the person responsible, they discover a single piece of evidence that changes the course of their investigation.

programme.title: The Nanny Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: Louise Woodward, an 18-year-old au pair from Britain, is accused of murdering eight-month-old Matthew Eappen by violently shaking him. Her trial creates a media firestorm, searing the term 'shaken baby syndrome' into America's consciousness.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Blood on the Bed
programme.desc: When 27-year-old Byron Edwards is found brutally stabbed in his home, his family is absolutely devastated. But as detectives work to find the person responsible, they discover a single piece of evidence that changes the course of their investigation.

programme.title: The Nanny Trial: The Crimes That Changed Us
programme.desc: Louise Woodward, an 18-year-old au pair from Britain, is accused of murdering eight-month-old Matthew Eappen by violently shaking him. Her trial creates a media firestorm, searing the term 'shaken baby syndrome' into America's consciousness.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Deadly Secret
programme.desc: When 30-year old Katrina Smith, a loving wife and step-mother goes missing, her family stops at nothing to find her. But the search for Katrina reveals that her once perfect life had come apart at the seams, and her darkest fears had become all too real.

programme.title: Never Say Goodbye: Fatal Premonition
programme.desc: When a newly retired schoolteacher vanishes into thin air, his daughter fears the worst. But nothing could prepare her for the series of mysterious events that would follow, revealing a world of deception and double identity.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Mirror in the Basement
programme.desc: When Adele and Stephen Craven bring in handyman Rusty McIntire to remodel their suburban basement, it kicks off a chain of events that razes their marriage to the ground, rocks their trust in the people around them and ultimately has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Broken Trust: The Landlord
programme.desc: Karen Jenkins' building is in a rough area, but she's determined to help the neighbourhood and all of her tenants along with it. The problem is that each of them seems to have something to hide, and one of them will do anything to keep those secrets safe.

programme.title: Broken Trust: Home Protection
programme.desc: Signe Edwards is a true-blue Texan. But when an injury forces her off the saddle, she relies on a series of handymen and sketchy online acquaintances for help around the house. One of them will betray her in the most horrific way.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Black Widow
programme.desc: When Cindy Taylor was a teen, her world was shattered by the sudden death of her father. Police said it was a heart attack, but years later Cindy would discover her father's death was just one of the deadly secrets her mother had been hiding from her.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Who Killed Thanksgiving?
programme.desc: When a mother of four is found tortured and brutally murdered in her home, the people of Northport, Washington discover that their isolation doesn't guarantee their safety.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Mr. & Mrs. Fantastic
programme.desc: When elderly couple Charles and Grace Lewis vanish from the family farm along with their pickup truck, their children realize that something is terribly wrong. As word spreads, fear envelopes the quiet religious community of Bonne Terre, MO.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Nightmare After Christmas
programme.desc: Rumors fly in the small town of Auburn, New Hampshire after well-known local George Jodoin is found murdered in his bed and the top three suspects are his close friends.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Petrosino vs. the Mafia
programme.desc: Turn-of-the-century Little Italy is a dangerous place, but as New York City's first Italian-American detective, Joe Petrosino is determined to do whatever it takes to protect his people.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Jelly Bryce: The Perfect Shot
programme.desc: With outlaws firing machine guns in the streets of Oklahoma City, sharp-shooting legend Delf 'Jelly' Bryce is on a collision course with some of the most violent men in America.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: A Stitch in Time
programme.desc: Andrew and Melissa had a home inspection before they bought the house, but the inspector missed signs of obvious neglect that could lead directly to much bigger issues.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Something Old, Sump-thing New
programme.desc: Steven and Jennifer have been burned by a bad home inspection before and decided to upgrade to a new house, confident that it would have fewer problems. Now they need Mike to do a Holmes Inspection to bring the rest of their problems to light.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Smart Suburban Holmes
programme.desc: With the interior of the river house complete, it's time to focus on the suburban home as the open house date is fast approaching. Mike, MJ and the crew work feverishly to get the smart home ready and receive the valuation they're hoping to earn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Thousand Goodbyes
programme.desc: Flooring takes center stage inside the country house, while outside the barn is finally completed. The river house gets its finishing touches as Mike and MJ prepare to say goodbye to the Thousand Islands.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Holmes Stretch
programme.desc: The first property that Mike Holmes and his son, MJ, bought is the last to be finished. Time is money, and there's still a ton of work to be done before they can put the sign up on the lawn.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Florida Engagement Renovation
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple Missy and Devon are looking to purchase their first home together in Ormond-by-the-Sea, Florida. With their wedding months away, the project threatens to be too much for the young couple to handle.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Relocation Renovation
programme.desc: A NYC couple looks to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and purchases a fixer-upper only a short ferry ride away on the Jersey Shore. But once renovations begin, they discover so many problems that they wonder if they might be in over their heads.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: O.G. Flavor
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Festival of Fries
programme.desc: Everyone's favorite side dish takes center stage as Noah Cappe celebrates over-the-top fries loaded with every topping you could imagine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Munchies on the Go
programme.desc: The fairground wasn't made for forks and knives, so Noah Cappe is checking out the hand-held carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Southern Treats
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe samples Southern hospitality on fairgrounds across the county. The carnival treats he finds are all infused with a down-home goodness that makes each bite taste like Southern sugar and spice.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 'Tis the Season
programme.desc: Why save your holiday favorites for the holidays, when you can enjoy them year-round at the fair! Some of your favorite holiday dishes get the carnival eats treatment.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Citizen Candy Cane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Greater Baton Rouge State Fair for a helping of Cajun treats, like the Cajun Boudin Taco and Pecan Pie Pop. Then he's off to bask in the lights -- and eats -- of the Aurora Winter Festival in Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande

programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheese Please!

programme.desc: 'Elf-testants' compete in holiday-themed challenges to have their wish lists granted.

programme.title: The Loud House: Snow Way Out/ Snow Way Down
programme.desc: Despite the heavy snowfall, Lana convinces the kids to go to the Burpin' Burger to meet her racecar driving hero. Lincoln goes on vacation with Clyde and realizes just how overprotective Clyde's dads are.

programme.title: The Loud House: Potty Mouth/ 'L' Is for Love
programme.desc: When the kids hear Lily curse, they're worried they have been a bad influence on her. A love letter addressed to 'L' Loud shows up at the house and the family has to figure out who it was meant for.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Two of Clubs/ Vacation Daze
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Sid have trouble finding an after-school program they both like. And, Ronnie Anne has to compete with her family for quality time when Maria takes a day off.

programme.title: The Loud House: Kick the Bucket List/ Party Down

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob

programme.desc: Roy Wood Jr. looks back at the most unethical, outrageous and immoral moments from President Trump's time in office -- from his obstruction of justice to his attempt to buy Greenland.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Wars

programme.desc: Randy steps forward with a solution to fix the desperate state of the economy. Stan and Kyle find another solution and save the townspeople's finances.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Tabora Family - Part 5
programme.desc: As reveal day gets closer, the team is putting in the work to transform the Tabora's house both inside and out. You won't want to miss the final phase of work before we bring the family home.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: With a recent move and tough financial times, the Saunders family is facing a bleak Christmas. When the family finds a bag full of money belonging to two bumbling crooks, things get interesting.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Movie: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: After returning to her hometown for Christmas, a woman finds her home lacks Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: Mistletoe and Menorahs
programme.desc: After being enlisted by a co-worker's friend to decorate for the holidays. A young woman learns to appreciate various holiday traditions.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Murders on Lake Oconee
programme.desc: Russell Dermond’s headless body is discovered in the garage of his million-dollar lakefront mansion. His wife, Shirley, is found floating dead in the water, her ankles tethered with cinder blocks. One key piece of evidence still remains missing.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished from School
programme.desc: After 7-year-old Kyron Horman’s stepmother drops him off at a school science fair and takes a picture, the little boy is never seen again. His disappearance is one of the largest mysteries and investigations in Oregon’s history.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: You'll Never Find Him
programme.desc: 6-year-old Timmothy Pitzen vanishes after a three-day trip to waterparks and the zoo with his mom. In a terrifying twist, his mom is found dead in a motel room with a disturbing note by her side.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bed of Deceit
programme.desc: When a retired police officer is found shot dead in his bed, investigators suspect suicide. But the evidence, alongside surveillance tape from a nearby bank, seems to indicate it was murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoke in Your Eyes
programme.desc: The bodies of two young women are found in the ashes of an apartment fire, which appears to have been set deliberately.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flower Power
programme.desc: Two different men call police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.
