programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Blood and Mud
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey ends up battered and bruised after snatching a $1 million Falcon 20 owned by a debtor he has a long, rocky history with. Mike Kennedy is called in to repo a Cessna 208 Caravan used in the illegal trafficking of exotic animals.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Panic at 10,000
programme.desc: Over the skies of North Texas, Kevin and Heather have grabbed themselves a Lear jet. But when a mechanical failure leads to a dangerous imbalance in the jet's fuel load, Kevin Lacey must descend through a building storm to make an emergency landing.

programme.title: BattleBots: Let the Big Bot Battle Begin
programme.desc: Witch Doctor, the2019 runner-up, starts their campaign against last year's breakout-bot Hydra. Titans Mammoth and Huge face off in an epic battle of the big bots and the elusive Black Dragon risks robotic life and limb against Kraken.

programme.title: BattleBots: Stop! Hammer Time!
programme.desc: Legendary hammer-bot Beta returns to face off with Rotator, one of the deadliest horizontal spinners on the planet. Later, two rising stars attempt to stake their claim in the contest as Gruff pits its dual-flamethrowers against Hypershock.

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Santa's Souped-Up Sleigh
programme.desc: The teams return for the final ornament tournament where they must make an expedited delivery of letters, send decorations to Christmas Town without breaking a bobble and give Santa's sleigh a turbo boost to claim the golden rocket tree-topper trophy!

programme.title: Rocket Around the Christmas Tree: Spatial Delivery
programme.desc: Three teams face off in a festive engineering challenge that will have them blasting trees into the center of Christmas Town, sending snowmen sky high and assisting Santa in his chimney ascent; failure to launch will have them on this year's naughty list.

programme.desc: Three teams face off in a festive engineering challenge that will have them blasting trees into the center of Christmas Town, sending snowmen sky high and assisting Santa in his chimney ascent; failure to launch will have them on this year's naughty list.

programme.title: BattleBots: Return of the Bots
programme.desc: Hard-hitting, steel-splitting combat returns as 60 teams converge for a tournament of all-out robotic carnage! Jack Barker from End Game finally gets the match he's been waiting for as he squares off with Ray Billings and his lethal bot Tombstone.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Airing of Grievances
programme.desc: Tony tells why the gold totals are a closely guarded secret on the mine site. Monica welcomes her best friend Ruby to join. Rick explains how he and Carl developed such a close bond. Tyson joins Mitch and Brennan to discuss Mitch's big blow up.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Soviets
programme.desc: The Soviet Union built countless engineering marvels beyond the Iron Curtain, but today, these mysterious places are abandoned; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Soviets
programme.desc: The Soviet Union built countless engineering marvels beyond the Iron Curtain, but today, these mysterious places are abandoned; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Scariest Places
programme.desc: Some of the world's scariest places are abandoned buildings and failed engineering projects, and using cutting-edge tech, experts unravel the dark secrets and bloody stories inside these strange ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Scariest Places
programme.desc: Some of the world's scariest places are abandoned buildings and failed engineering projects, and using cutting-edge tech, experts unravel the dark secrets and bloody stories inside these strange ruins.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Wastelands
programme.desc: The Nazis built secret megastructures during their bloodthirsty quest for world domination, but today, they're now abandoned. Experts are rediscovering these lost places to reveal the mysteries of how they were built and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Wastelands
programme.desc: The Nazis built secret megastructures during their bloodthirsty quest for world domination, but today, they're now abandoned. Experts are rediscovering these lost places to reveal the mysteries of how they were built and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Strangest
programme.desc: The United States is home to countless eerie and abandoned places, and using the latest tech, experts make new discoveries to reveal the secrets of how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: America's Strangest
programme.desc: The United States is home to countless eerie and abandoned places, and using the latest tech, experts make new discoveries to reveal the secrets of how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Mammoth Claw
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is finally down to virgin ground but discovers their equipment is no match for the giant boulders at Rockfall Ravine, so Wes fabricates a new tool for their arsenal: The Mammoth Claw. Fred puts greenhorn Scott to the test.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Twin Baby Surprise
programme.desc: When Jasmine is taken to the hospital with abdominal cramps, she is stunned to learn she's in labour with a breech baby and shocked that there's a twin.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on the Bathroom Floor
programme.desc: Cramping and back pain keeps Katlyn from class and a trip to the bathroom brings her to her knees in pain as she goes into labour.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on the Move
programme.desc: As the nurses to try to move Amy into an exam room, she starts giving birth to a baby in her pants.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby in the Bowl
programme.desc: Dragica just lost the weight from her first pregnancy, and is shocked when she gives birth to a baby in the toilet.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Shock of My Life
programme.desc: A teacher's aid fails to recognize the signs of pregnancy, and mistakes labour pains as menstrual cramps.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Gas and Go Baby
programme.desc: When Christie experiences extreme pain and cramping, she heads to the emergency room with her mother.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: My Head's Exploding
programme.desc: A patient with a severe headache is seizing, then bruises erupt on her legs and her doctor has no idea why; a naked woman is behaving so oddly that her doctor thinks she's on drugs; and a wrestler has been vomiting for days, and the cause is a shock.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Escaping Diagnosis
programme.desc: A disoriented young woman in a bunny costume lands in the ER on April Fool's Day. A doctor treats a patient whose severed thumb needs reattachment, but can't treat another patient's less severe cut.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Frat Boy Blues
programme.desc: An entire fraternity is plagued with blue urine; a pregnant woman may lose her baby to a tiny terror; and a man returns from a trip abroad with a souvenir that nearly costs him his life.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER because he was hurt by a boat propeller. A patient creates a deadly chain reaction after they are discharged. The ER's head nurse and computers are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis
programme.desc: A teenage girl is impaled through the neck on an iron fence; a patient is convinced he's turning into a vampire; to save the life of a critically ill pregnant woman, a first-year attending physician has to stand up to a room full of senior specialists.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Grave Diagnosis

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: For the Love of Dawsyn
programme.desc: Deon worries he'll fall apart if he attends Dawsyn's surgery. Darian opens up to her parents about the challenges of being the oldest of 14 children. Dawsyn's surgery day arrives, and the family prays for a good outcome.

programme.title: Doubling Down With the Derricos: Quarantine With Eighteen
programme.desc: The Derricos endure the coronavirus pandemic with two high-risk family members in their house: GG and Dawsyn. Despite making every effort to stay safe, Deon and Karen's worst fears are realized when Dawsyn is rushed to the ER in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Mom's Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Stephanie wants to look like a 'sex kitten' on her big day, but her mom wishes for something modest. Second-time bride Lisa's mother is very opinionated about her dress choices. Elizabeth fears her mom won't approve the $13K gown she bought without her.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Whose Side Are You On?
programme.desc: Michaella is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom. Also, fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: I Feel Like I'm in Dress Heaven
programme.desc: Bride Sherien is ecstatic that she finally gets to shop for her wedding dress. Her fiancé is in federal prison, however, giving her a couple more years to browse. Bride Carla requires a gown for her intimate, magical elopement in Santorini, Greece.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Somebody Just Turned on the Vixen!
programme.desc: Bride Erin wants a sexy vixen reception dress. Bride Sami and her mom are both best friends and psychics, but her mom may not be able to predict her daughter's dress tastes.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Lisa and April
programme.desc: Lisa hopes to spend $15 for a month's worth of groceries to feed her family of six.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Katherine and Joel
programme.desc: Katherine will go on a major haul before taking a six-month break from couponing. Joel is a 16-year-old who is obsessed with couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rebecca and Jessica
programme.desc: Rebecca will fit all of her food needs for her huge party into her $50 monthly food budget. Jessica will pull off 18 transactions to get over $600 worth of groceries.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chris and Joni
programme.desc: With her 'coupontourage' in tow, Joni gets extra food for donating. Chris gets groceries for Feeding America.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Wedded to Disaster
programme.desc: Gorger Alyssa is ready to marry Romney man, Lacy, but their relationship is put to the test when Lacy's mom refuses to accept her soon to be daughter in law.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Jinxes and Wedding Hijinks
programme.desc: Sisters Brittany and Kalynn plan to wed their gorger fiancés in a Gypsy-style double wedding, but their big day may be put on hold when a jealous sister-in-law threatens to start a war. Later, a superstitious couple is convinced their wedding is cursed.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Sisters Don't Marry Each Other's Husbands
programme.desc: Karen is ready for her perfect gypsy wedding. Problem is, she's marrying her sister's ex-husband, and neither her mom, nor her sister approves. Then, Selena decides to abandon gypsy tradition.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Surprise, You're Getting Married
programme.desc: Nukkie's wedding to Jonas may be in jeopardy after an ex re-enters their lives. When the problems fall onto sister Dallas's shoulders it's a wild race to the altar. Gypsy mom Jett locks horns with her own mother over her little girl's birthday party.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: A Holly Jolly Ridiculousness VII

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.desc: A woman teaches both herself and her children to accept her ex-husband's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby Gets Sacked
programme.desc: Boston burger king Paul Malvone faces off against Twin City chef Jack Riebel on the gridiron. Former professional football player Eddie Jackson and sportscaster Jaymee Sire decide which chef gets the chance to sack Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Never Give Up
programme.desc: One shot at Bobby Flay wasn't enough for Italian chef Pasquale Cozzolino and Canada's infamous Ivana Raca, who are back for more. Iron Chefs Alex Guarnaschelli and Stephanie Izard give the play-by-play and dole out their final shot at redemption.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feel the Judgment
programme.desc: The tables are turned when past Beat Bobby Flay judges Christian Petroni and Leah Cohen return to the kitchen to take matters into their own hands. Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale and Chef Jet Tila judge the judges.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sprouting Victory
programme.desc: Canadian chef Lawrence Letrero matches wits with Ohio's Jack Moore for the chance at Bobby Flay. Scott Conant and Anne Burrell, who share a love of big hair and watching Bobby lose, conspire to bring home the win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Against The Grain
programme.desc: Chopped host Ted Allen and Food Network's Damaris Phillips try to rewrite history. Attempting to make Bobby Flay's domination a thing of the past are Southern heirloom chef Paul Fehribach and spunky pan-Asian chef Sara Nguyen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: They Took The Cheese
programme.desc: It's a battle of Southern chefs as Houston's Roshni Gurnani faces off against New Orleans' Carl Schaubhut. Coaching them to victory against Bobby Flay are "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell and "Chopped's" Marcus Samuelsson.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: 'Chopped's' Alex Guarnaschelli and Cake Boss Buddy Valastro don't sugarcoat their desire to take down Bobby Flay. The princess of pastry Paulette Goto and sweet sensation Zac Young return for a chance at revenge.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge: Visions of Christmas
programme.desc: Five visionary bakers use cookies to show off their idea of Christmas future. Then they recreate the excitement of unwrapping gifts on Christmas morning by building baked and breakable gift displays.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Easy as Pie
programme.desc: From an entire Thanksgiving dinner stuffed into a pie to the Texas-sized Pumpecapple, these friendly shops across America are finding many ways to fill a pie crust.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sandwich Heroes
programme.desc: From fried bologna made fancy to bright lobster on pitch-black bread, these mild-mannered hometown standards go beyond the same-old-same-old and earning their bragging rights as sandwich heroes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Italian, Thai and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a righteous time revisiting joints offering everything from pie to Thai. In Honolulu, a family spot going strong with their specialties straight out of Thailand.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory Sensations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's warming up with some standout specialties. In Brooklyn, N.Y., the mom and pop diner flipping a skillet apple waffle with pancetta and deep-frying breakfast empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Guy's Going Home
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's hittin' up some of his favourite hometown haunts. First, he pops into a Mexican joint right in his Santa Rosa, Calif., 'hood, where he chows on the pozole every time he's off the road.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Bedrock or Bust
programme.desc: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Never Say Die
programme.desc: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Guts No Glory
programme.desc: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon become greenhorn old miners and head to Alaska to dig for gold in hopes of striking it big to save themselves from financial ruin.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold, Guns, and Bears
programme.desc: The greenhorn miners are at risk when a mechanical accident threatens to close mining season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Running Dirt
programme.desc: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold and the men's only mechanic becomes dangerously ill, the tension builds so high Dorsey and Todd come to blows.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Ultimate Price
programme.desc: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant, but a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Yeti or Not
programme.desc: Dr. Mark Evans, a veterinarian and explorer, is on a mission to sift fact from folklore and distil the plausible from the possible as he searches for a rational explanation for the mysterious Himalayan biped known as the Yeti.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: River Monsters: Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Investigating the deadly bullshark, which isn't limited to the world's oceans.

programme.title: River Monsters: Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo in search of the world's most ferocious fish.

programme.title: Movie: Deliver Us From Eva
programme.desc: An uptight woman constantly meddles in the affairs of her sisters and their husbands.

programme.title: Movie: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care centre.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.desc: The gang all chip in for a raffle ticket and they win a brand new SUV.

programme.desc: A crooked preacher cons thousands of dollars from churchgoers, so Martin and Gina try to catch his confession on video.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Dancing With the Stools

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown Magic
programme.desc: Excited to spend quality father-stepson bonding time with Rallo, Cleveland takes Rallo to his very first magic show, where they get hired to be the opening act.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Nazca
programme.desc: Nazca remains one of the most mysterious sites on Earth. The desert floor is covered in geoglyphs that can only be gully viewed from the sky, the mountains appear to have had their peaks sliced off and a band of man-sized holes stretches for two miles.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Founding of America
programme.desc: It is evident that Washington, D.C was inspired by the ancient world. There are Greek pillars, Roman domes and other clear examples of this. Ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos believes there may have been otherworldly influences.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Puma Punku
programme.desc: The ancient ruins of Puma Punku have mystified archaeologists ever since their discovery hundreds of years ago. The massive stones are precisely carved into blocks that are unlike anything found anywhere else in the world.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of the Cyclops
programme.desc: The mystery of the Mediterranean island of Malta lies south of Sicily and is home to megalithic structures. The massive blocks pre-date the Great Pyramid of Giza.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: Searching for Bigfoot
programme.desc: Many reported sightings of big, hairy monsters in America are also accompanied by accounts of UFO activity and unexplained lights in the sky. If the creature known as Bigfoot really exists, it could be living proof that extraterrestrials have been here.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Mystery of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos travels from the Highlands of Scotland to the shores of Vermont's Lake Champlain in his quest to learn more about these elusive lake monsters.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: Ancient astronaut theorist Giorgio A. Tsoukalos explores the most recent discoveries related to the centuries old story of Atlantis. By investigating a series of clues, Tsoukalos endeavors to narrow down the possible location of Atlantis.

programme.title: In Search of Aliens: The Roswell Rock
programme.desc: A mysterious rock was discovered in Roswell, New Mexico in 2004. Now called 'The Roswell Rock, this unusually smooth stone possess unique magnetic properties.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Mysterious Mountains
programme.desc: Across ancient civilizations, the world's mountains were viewed as the sacred home to all-powerful gods. For the Greeks, it was the Olympians, and in Peru, Incan descendants continue an ancient pilgrimage to commune with mountain spirits known as Apu.

programme.desc: A rogue chauffeur blackmails a Baroness and seduces her head cook to get her life savings.

programme.title: Movie: Passion Flower

programme.desc: A group of East Berliners try to evade suspicion and dig their way under the Berlin Wall.

programme.title: Movie: King of Kings
programme.desc: The epic retelling of Christ's life and the effects of his teachings on those around him.

programme.title: Unearthed: Legend of King Midas

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of Venice

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Beating Columbus
programme.desc: Expert archaeologists investigate the first confirmed Viking settlement in America, and using cutting-edge technology, they're making new discoveries that will change everything we know about American history.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Mystery of the Sea Raiders
programme.desc: Experts investigate a mysterious set of clues that suggest the Vikings could have ventured deeper into North America, and using cutting-edge tech, they put Viking ships to the test to reveal how far they could have gone.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: War in the New World
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that Vikings and Native Americans might have fought a thousand years ago, and using cutting-edge tech, experts put their weaponry and tactics to the test to find out who might have won.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Ghosts of the Great Lakes
programme.desc: A mysterious artifact might be evidence that Vikings reached the American Midwest, and to investigate this controversial theory, archaeologists build a Viking boat to test if their ships could manage a dangerous 1,000-mile journey over the Great Lakes.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: Curse of Death Island
programme.desc: A team of expert archaeologists are hot on the trail of the legendary Viking utopia of the Americas, and clues from the ancient Sagas lead them to a mysterious, hostile island with a deadly past.

programme.title: America's Lost Vikings: The Alaska Enigma
programme.desc: New discoveries suggest that the Vikings of North America didn't just disappear, but might have traveled further into American than anyone ever imagined, and using the latest tech, experts put this shocking theory to the test.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Buried Deep

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: A Killing in Kendrick

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Three's Company, Four's a Crowd
programme.desc: A husband concerned that he can't get ahold of his wife after an alarm is tripped at their house calls police and asks them to meet him at their house. They find his wife dead, and now must connect the dots between an earlier burglary and a love triangle.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed the Yogi?
programme.desc: A 45-year-old yoga instructor is found gunned down on his front porch on a hot September morning in Tucson. With evidence of a burglary, detectives wonder if the victim interrupted the crime. The case proves much more complex when a witness steps forward.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Three's Company, Four's a Crowd

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Grudge
programme.desc: With her good looks and sunny demeanor, doctor's assistant and part-time model Christine Kent attracts her fair share of admirers. But after one encounter ignites jealousy and obsession, Christine is blind-sided by the devastating consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Devastated by personal loss, Heather Kelso finds a fresh start in a familiar place and falls fast for charismatic Gerry DeJesus. But jealousy and other friendships will ultimately drive a deadly wedge straight into the heart of their relationship.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mistress Roulette
programme.desc: Dr. Adam Frasch has a dangerous secret: he has an insatiable appetite for women. He collects them as he does exotic cars, but unlike cars, he stashes them in his various properties, hiding them from one another, and especially his wife.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad
programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Cold War Files
programme.desc: Reinhard Gehlen was the head of Nazi Germany's intelligence operation against the Soviets. That made him invaluable to the West during the Cold War but he could have told his new allies what they wanted to hear and fuelled the arms race.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Nazi King
programme.desc: The British Royal Family may have changed its name from Saxe-Coburg-Gotha to Windsor but some believe they didn't lose their allegiance to Germany. Was Edward VIII a Nazi sympathizer? Did his brother try to negotiate peace with Germany?

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Run Down Family Rental

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: 1913 Beach Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley find a rundown 1913 beach bungalow that's about to be demolished. They transform the small kitchen into a modern, open-concept space with vintage touches and restore the original hardwood floors and shiplap walls.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker
programme.desc: A couple buys a dilapidated cabin in Phillips, Maine, in hopes of keeping the area's fly-fishing traditions alive. Chase Morrill and his team pull out all the stops to fix a myriad of issues in just 11 weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1926 French Normandy Cottage
programme.desc: A cottage build in 1926 was a severely neglected rental for 30 years. Brett deals with a leaky roof, rotten windows, missing floorboards and damaged walls.

programme.title: Restored: 1913 Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1913 craftsman bungalow for a young couple with a baby on the way. He's challenged with finding a way to bring back the natural wood in the house while still making it bright and welcoming.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Nutty for Nuts
programme.desc: Today is going to be a little nut! Hazelnuts can sweeten a savory dish, peanuts can bring a bit of saltiness to a dessert, and pistachios can add a crunchy texture.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Grillin' It
programme.desc: Since humans first discovered cooking with fire, they've been perfecting the art of the grill. Eddie Jackson chases after the smoky undertones and sweet, bitter char that only flame-grilling creates.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bay Area
programme.desc: California's East Bay area is a thriving multi-ethnic community. Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary hot spots where Chinese Dim Sum, Indian Pani Puri, American Soul food and Mexican tacos are being served up in traditional style.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Portland
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Portland, Oregon where free thinking foodies are pushing the limits when it comes to creating what to eat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Iowa
programme.desc: Andrew discovers a world of unexpected flavors in the middle of America's heartland when he makes a visit to Iowa! From head cheese and pickled onion to a Sudanese stew, Andrew finds out that there's a lot more than meat and potatoes on the table in Iowa!

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins
programme.desc: Casey's multi-year campaign against cuisine has resulted in numerous W's and now find out which was the most epic.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Belly of the Beast/ Moon Farm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb construct a mechanical shark. The boys take a cow to the moon in order to test a theory on the best tasking ice cream.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!

programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: Movie: Merry Liddle Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: An event planner who has given up on love, but one day, she meets the perfect man. After learning that Mr. Perfect is being transferred overseas for work, she asks Santa to work his magic and bring them together.

programme.title: Movie: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly has never introduced her toy designer boyfriend Connor to her family and has only revealed that they live 'up north.' Holly knows she can't wait any longer and decides to bring Conner to meet her parents for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Let's Meet Again on Christmas Eve
programme.desc: College sweethearts get opportunities on opposite sides of the world, so they decide to part ways and meet again in two years on Christmas Eve to see if they are really meant to be.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: A college student is found dead and the evidence suggests he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Rick's Sixth Sense

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Lost Gold of Paradise Hill

programme.title: Gold Rush: Empire Building
programme.desc: Parker prospects new ground in Alaska. Rick digs deep for big gold in a second cut. Fred Lewis installs a unique dam. Dustin's confronted by a wall of giant boulders. Fred's team makes a rookie mistake. The Dakota Boys and Fred Lewis join the Dirt.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Boundary Blowout
programme.desc: On the scent of big gold, Turin and his crew test the limits of the landowner's patience when they cut a fence to access ground on his cattle grazing land. Dave investigates another promising hard rock mine.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar: Curse of the Black Chalice
programme.desc: Two treasure hunters examine their most stunning find: the Black Obsidian Chalice. Together, they investigate the treasure's mysterious origins, decode its strange markings and reveal the secret ceremonies where it may have once been used.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: One of a Kind Dress Requests

programme.desc: Shari looks for a 30-year anniversary vow renewal dress with her high maintenance hubby.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convict makes a surprise attack; the Portland MAX killer lashes out in court; a defendant trying to escape court gets stopped by a bulletproof window.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: A harrowing rescue at Niagara Falls with a man's feet trapped in an underwater crevice. Then, a man is flung hundreds of feet from a racing boat. Later, a volcano erupts and a helicopter crashes.

programme.title: Shockwave
programme.desc: A speeding race boat can't stop as it comes to the finish line, hits the beach at full speed, is thrown 50 feet in the air and explodes as it flies into power lines.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: HellCopter
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q pose as unreceptive receptionists in an office waiting room, then head to a wax museum where they mingle with the stiff crowd. And in tonight’s double punishment, two losers are taken on a chopper ride from hell.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: The Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Comical Fools

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Bungling Boneheads
programme.desc: Discover why reading while roller blading and the ice bucket challenge don't always go as planned. Also, find out that it is possible to fall through a trampoline.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: You've Got Fail
programme.desc: Find out why a boy regrets his first kiss.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Churnt Up

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Retro

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: American Classics

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: To Catch a Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Nepal to investigate a lone fisherman dragged into a river by a goonch catfish. In Indonesia, Jeremy comes face-to-face with a mysterious sea creature that has been killing local fishermen and tourists.

programme.title: Big Cat Tales: Peril on the Horizon
programme.desc: Clashing elephants force the Marsh pride to take cover. Fig the leopard continues to give vital lessons for young cub. The Marsh pride females are threatened by unknown nomadic males. Amani the cheetah battles a hyena over food.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mysteries of the Ocean: Razorhead

programme.title: River Monsters: Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Investigating the deadly bullshark, which isn't limited to the world's oceans.

programme.title: River Monsters: Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo in search of the world's most ferocious fish.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub
programme.desc: The ingenuity of zoo staff is put to the test as they devise a treatment for a newborn snow leopard cub struggling to walk and a group of surprisingly adorable Rodrigues fruit bats are trained for a big move.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bears Will Be Bears
programme.desc: The brown bears keep tearing up their exhibit, leaving zoo staff scrambling for a solution. Armani the aardvark gets treated for a tooth infection which has dampened her enthusiasm for digging. And, a group of burrowing owls prepare to move.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: The Zoo: Cougar Cub Rescue
programme.desc: A trio of abandoned puma cubs arrives at the zoo, while the staff grows concerned that Ella, the oldest rhino, is not acting herself. Meanwhile, a Caribbean flamingo is born at the zoo after nearly two decades, and Otto the stallion makes his debut.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: The Zoo: Penguins In Love
programme.desc: Seven "Little Blues" join the penguin exhibit and are quick to mingle with the rest of the colony. When a honey-loving grizzly slows her step, the staff grows concerned. A turtle can't seem to get along with the alligators, and a nyala calf is born.

programme.title: Movie: Daddy Day Care

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns
programme.desc: After years of trying to make ends meet, a single mother of three finds out that the father she's never known has passed away. She decides to go to the funeral in hopes of getting to know a part of her family she never knew existed.

programme.title: Movie: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Insects
programme.desc: Earth is home to 10 quintillion insects. In cultures throughout the world, insects have been honoured, feared and even revered as gods.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Prototypes
programme.desc: Recent archaeological discoveries reveal a very different picture of what life on Earth looked like in the remote past. It was like a real life 'Lord of the Rings' where humans shared the planet with different types of human-like species.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secret Files: Secrets of the Exoplanets
programme.desc: Over the past 20 years, thousands of potentially habitable exoplanets have been discovered outside our solar system.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Reptilian Agenda
programme.desc: We investigate the serpent gods that are found in the religious traditions of Mesopotamia, Central and South America, India, China and Japan, even the Bible depicts reptilian entities communicating with humans.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Giants of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Ancient cultures throughout the Mediterranean recorded stories of enormous beings from the sky. Discoveries of structures and skeletons suggest these giants may have once inhabited part of the world.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Forbidden Bible
programme.desc: It is possible that the Book of Enoch was stricken from the Bible because it documents humanity's extraterrestrial origin.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Today, we discuss ancient myths across a wide variety of cultures in which the gods are portrayed as intervening in human affairs. It is possible that these supernatural events may not be the work of gods, but rather proof of extraterrestrials.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: According to the earliest Tibetan traditions, the kingdom of the gods Shambhala is hidden high in the Himalaya Mountains.
