programme.title: Grant: Freedom's Champion
programme.desc: Ulysses S. Grant defeats Robert E. Lee and secures victory for the Union. Years later, he is called to duty once again to serve as President.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Stargates
programme.desc: Legends from around the world speak of sacred entryways to the land of the gods -- gates that allowed instant passage not just beyond the confines of Earth, but beyond space and time. Such legends are investigated in Turkey and Mexico.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Secrets of the Mummies
programme.desc: Ancient Astronaut theorists believe the global practice of mummification is not a coincidence, but proof that highly advanced extraterrestrials visited Earth in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Alien Frequency
programme.desc: The use of mantras and chanting to connect with a higher plane has existed in cultures all over the world dating back thousands of years. We explore if there are certain frequencies that connect us with higher, perhaps extraterrestrial, forces.

programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.desc: The campers participate in a gift-making activity for the upcoming holiday and Griff is not into it. Ravi and Lou try to create a special memory for Griff, while Santa asks Jorge to babysit for one of his reindeer.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: After Johnny Altinger vanished, the trail of clues led investigators to a young director. Detectives worried that the case was a hoax staged by a master storyteller. Turns out, the script was darker than anyone knew.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Jessica Nelson was a hardworking single mom. Then, one morning, she was found dead in her home. The discovery left her family shattered and their ordeal had just begun. Turns out, the killer was someone they knew.

programme.title: A Rage-ful Christmas
programme.desc: An unthinkable family nightmare unfolds after a mother and her two daughters never show up for a Christmas dinner; a search by officers of their home uncovers all three bodies shot to death, sparking a race to find the killer.

programme.title: Mistletoe and Mourning
programme.desc: A quiet town is rocked when an elderly couple, Bob and Idella Young, are viciously massacred at home on Christmas Eve; when the supposed killer's DNA is found on a bloody glove at the crime scene, investigators must work to find a match.

programme.title: Holiday Horror
programme.desc: It's a holiday tragedy when firefighters make a shocking discovery inside a local house fire; with three people found shot to death inside, a nationwide manhunt ensues through Christmastime for a murderer armed to kill.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Fugitive Millionaire
programme.desc: A tech giant living in paradise. His neighbor found dead. Then, suddenly, the entrepreneur extraordinaire was on the run, taunting authorities and tantalizing the press. It was a riveting game of hide-and-seek, but were police chasing the right man?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Motive
programme.desc: He was a force on the football field. Then, the charming athlete was shot. His killer left few clues and the case sat cold until someone spilled a secret. What police asked the tipster to do next would make her a target. How much would she risk?

programme.title: License to Kill: Homicidal Homecare
programme.desc: A beloved grandfather vanishes out of the blue. Strange activity in his financial records leads detectives on a chase from California to Mexico, where they reach a devastating conclusion.

programme.title: License to Kill: Murder by Syringe
programme.desc: A Glendale, CA, hospital worker confesses to suffocating dozens of his patients. Investigators fear he'll walk free because doctors believe the victims died of natural causes.

programme.title: License to Kill: International Serial Killer
programme.desc: A doctor has an unnatural obsession with death. When the FBI gets involved after a string of mysterious deaths, they discover a 20-year-long trail of destruction that leads them on an international hunt to stop a sadistic madman.

programme.title: License to Kill: Killer Surgeon
programme.desc: An arrogant cosmetic surgeon operating out of a basement permanently scars and kills patients, then shocks detectives by attempting to murder a loved one.

programme.title: Dateline: Captured
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a freelance journalist who was kidnapped in Somalia and held in captivity for 15 months. This is the story of how she survived the ordeal and how her mother worked tirelessly to secure her release.

programme.title: Dateline: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search for El Chapo with never-before-seen videos and photos of the hunt for the notorious drug lord.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Deadly Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A deranged shooter attacks a family at Thanksgiving dinner leaving four dead and even more wounded. This horrific crime sets off a massive holiday-season manhunt to catch the killer – before they can strike again.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Morning Murder
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is murdered during what looks like a brutal home invasion. Police learn the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Holiday Terror
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: If Something Happens to Me
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously. Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell: A Family Affair
programme.desc: A defensive husband fleeing justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy. Stephanie Bauer brings new insight to the decade-old case of the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Hawes
programme.desc: A missing persons case spirals down a winding path once detectives learn that a formerly beloved older brother appears to have embezzled money from their family's business. His siblings are hell-bent on getting revenge.

programme.title: Movie: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Peter Parker has been busy juggling his regular life with his duties as Spider-Man. With the emergence of some powerful new villains -- Electro and the Rhino -- Peter comes to realize that the new threats on the city all point back to OsCorp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer vs. Dignity
programme.desc: While celebrating Bart's first 'A' at a steakhouse, Homer realizes he has no money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Skinner's Sense of Snow
programme.desc: The students and Principal Skinner find themselves snowed in at the elementary school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dude, Where's My Ranch?
programme.desc: Homer writes a song about his ill feelings for Ned Flanders and performs it at Moe's.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kill Gil, Volumes 1 & 2
programme.desc: The family is stuck with an unwanted houseguest after they open their home to Gil for the Christmas holidays. After a full year, an attempt at getting him a job and many failed 'accidents,' Marge finally grows a spine and throws Gil out Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas
programme.desc: Krusty tries to impress his daughter as they spend Christmas with the Simpsons. Meanwhile, Reverend Lovejoy seeks converts after church attendance plummets, and Maggie is haunted by a spooky Christmas toy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Boy
programme.desc: When Bart goes missing, the town puts together a search party to find him. After most give up hope, Sideshow Bob manipulates Millhouse into revealing where Bart is hiding.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 'Tis the 30th Season
programme.desc: After failed Black Friday shopping, Marge is determined to fix Christmas but Homer and the kids decide to surprise her by going on vacation to a Floridian resort that turns out to be a knock-off Disney World.

programme.title: Family Guy: Baby Stewie
programme.desc: Stewie builds a DNA-altering machine that will allow him to remain smart forever, but the invention has the adverse effect and he instead transforms into what he should have always been an actual baby.

programme.title: Family Guy: Better Off Meg
programme.desc: When Meg is erroneously reported to have died in a car crash, she goes along with the story to start a new life elsewhere. Meanwhile, the Griffins experience a life without Meg.

programme.title: Archer: Bel Panto, Part I
programme.desc: Party crashers turn a fundraiser into no laughing matter.

programme.title: Archer: Bel Panto: Part II
programme.desc: A hostage negotiation spirals out of control when Archer and Lana go missing.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Summer
programme.desc: Gordon finds that things have not gotten easier for the polar bears when he returns to Svalbard in the summer.

programme.title: The Polar Bear Family and Me: Autumn
programme.desc: Lyra is struggling to care for her cub while fighting off starvation in Autumn.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Revealing the riches and wonders of the Polar Regions that keep people coming for years. Its survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting edge science.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: An Epic Journey

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Nazi Doomsday Project
programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: The Gift of Life
programme.desc: Lifesaving medical technology takes Darieth to San Francisco to explore the world of transplant care. Transplant has evolved with DNA sequencing and Artificial Intelligence to give patients the best care before and after transplantation.

programme.title: Tomorrow's World Today: Zero Emissions Apart from Water
programme.desc: Futuristic cars may emit water instead of fumes. Tamara Krinsky heads to Los Angeles to investigate the science behind these hydrogen fuel cell powered vehicles, and take one for a test drive.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Confessions of the Exorcist
programme.desc: For the first time, a participant in the real exorcism that inspires the movie 'The Exorcist' reveals his experience.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Rich Get Richer
programme.desc: Penny Knell is admitted to a special care facility, where a devious mastermind is waiting to prey upon society's most vulnerable. When Penny's family gets caught in her web, the consequences will be fatal.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Truck Stop
programme.desc: The deceased body of a young mother is found naked and gruesomely displayed inside a public truck stop near downtown Nashville. Sergeant Postiglione uncovers a trail of evidence across multiple states that lead him to a serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Stopwatch
programme.desc: In 1993, a night clerk is shot dead inside the lobby of a hotel. Despite eyewitness accounts, Detective Postiglione can't locate the killer. Recalling subtle clues left outside the crime scene, he finally comes face to face with a most unusual suspect.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: An Obsession
programme.desc: The crime scene of a double murder shows evidence of conflicting motives. An unlikely clue on the living room floor helps Detective Postiglione zero in on what really happened, leading to the arrest of an unassuming killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend
programme.desc: Young mother Tyshika Askins is found dead in her home but after charging the wrong man, police knew the key to solving the case lies is an OJ container left out on a kitchen counter.

programme.title: Ice Cold Murder
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old woman disappears before Thanksgiving in Upstate New York, investigators wonder if someone seen throwing a suitcase into the icy Hudson River the day she went missing could be connected.

programme.title: True Conviction: The Stalker
programme.desc: After computer whiz Cari Farver goes missing, she starts sending threatening text messages to a new boyfriend, his ex-lover and her mother.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend
programme.desc: Young mother Tyshika Askins is found dead in her home but after charging the wrong man, police knew the key to solving the case lies is an OJ container left out on a kitchen counter.

programme.title: Ice Cold Murder
programme.desc: When a 21-year-old woman disappears before Thanksgiving in Upstate New York, investigators wonder if someone seen throwing a suitcase into the icy Hudson River the day she went missing could be connected.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Long Road to Justice
programme.desc: Anna-Sigga Nicolazzi meets the detective and prosecutor who took on the case of Karen Ann Watson, a wife and mother who was brutally stabbed to death. Nearly 30 years after the crime, they track down a killer who thinks he got away with murder.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: A Fresh Start
programme.desc: Single mom Christina Sanoubane, leaves Jacob Crosson, her abusive boyfriend and father of her two year old son Corbin, to move into her own apartment. But four days later when a friend comes to visit her, Corbin greets him with the words: 'Mommy's dead.'

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Going Places
programme.desc: A 39-year old woman, Melissa Lewis, has just made partner at a prestigious law firm, but when she is found murdered in a particularly personal manner.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Pressure Point
programme.desc: A Virginia Beach massage therapist disappears before work, sparking an intense but fruitless search. Weeks later, a cyclist discovers trash bags in a swamp, the contents of which will rock the town and forever change the lives of Brianna's loved ones.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Carpool Predator
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds a San Diego exotic wildlife park when one of its valued employees goes missing. As the search for Denise Vasseur intensifies, investigators fear that the most dangerous predator at the park is not an animal.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: Reeling from a recent breakup, 23 year-old Jacey McWilliams is down in the dumps until she finds herself smitten with a hot, new man. But just when it looks like they're about to take their relationship to the next level, it runs horrifically off course.

programme.title: Dead Silent: When a Stranger Knocks
programme.desc: After fleeing her troubled marriage, Deborah Brown and her kids seek refuge at her brother's house in rustic Lebanon, Maine. But when a stranger shows up in the dead of night seeking help, neither Deborah nor her family are prepared for what happens next.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Strange Passenger
programme.desc: In May 2000, friends Liz Reiser and Brandi Hicks go to a video store in the quaint Ohio town of New Philadelphia. Their plans for an innocent movie night morph into a true-life horror film when they give a ride to a stranger in the parking lot.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Savage Country
programme.desc: On their way to Oregon, young lovebirds Kevin Thorpe and Laura Craig come face-to-face with evil on the mountainous, desolate back roads of Northern California.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Pilgrims and Witches
programme.desc: The roots of America can be traced to the first settlers that came there. Learn that the Pilgrim 'Thanksgiving' was about fasting and the only 'witchcraft' in Salem was done by a group of young girls.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Roadside Stories
programme.desc: A whole other story is behind the roads and bridges that cross the United States. On this episode of America's Facts Vs. Fictions learn a woman was the driving force behind completing the Brooklyn Bridge and Route 66 wasn't built from scratch.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run to Costa Rica
programme.desc: David Harden is a clean-cut businessman living a double life as a burglar. His drug habit forces him to commit more daring crimes until he gets caught. He runs to Costa Rica, pulling scams until a friend turns him in.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Murder My Own Family
programme.desc: James Wiley was given a life sentence after killing his step-mom and three young brothers.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Lock and Load
programme.desc: A Texas separatist group takes two hostages. Rangers are able to negotiate the release, however two members, Richard Keyes and Mike Matson get away, evading helicopters and dogs. Using an underground militia group, Keyes hides out in the woods undetected.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Death Certificate
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, Anthony Ragno goes on the run. Building a new life trafficking pot in the Haitian islands, a coke addiction and close calls with local governments drive Ragno back to the US with a fake name.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Battles
programme.desc: With incredible archive from the heart of the action, and interviews with world-leading historians, this action-packed episode counts down the most decisive battles of warfare that have been caught on camera.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Aircraft
programme.desc: Find out about aircraft important to conflicts in the 20th and 21st centuries.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gearing Up for the Holidays
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer joins the search to find the greatest holiday baker begins as eight bakers enter the Holiday Kitchen, where they show off their family traditions and superb baking skills.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Filling Grateful
programme.desc: The popularity of holiday spiced nuts inspires Jesse Palmer's challenge to the nine bakers: Use the crowd-pleasing holiday gift to create spiced nut desserts.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving It My All
programme.desc: Apple cider doughnuts are a sure sign of fall, so in the first round, Jesse Palmer asks the eight bakers to create a dozen kicked-up apple cider doughnuts decorated with seasonal themes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Trendsetting Turkey Day
programme.desc: In the first challenge, Jesse Palmer tasks the seven bakers with taking a beloved holiday appetizer to a whole new level with baked brie and jam mini pies.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Gettin' Gifty with It
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer teaches the six bakers a lesson in repurposing holiday gifts in the first round, when they must turn panettone, the classic holiday Italian sweet bread, into an entirely new dessert.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: North Pole Vaulting
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the five bakers to create assigned desserts that are inspired by and look like Santa Claus. To secure their place in the final four, the bakers are tasked with creating impressive cakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Traditions with a Twist
programme.desc: Some of the tastiest treats of Hanukkah are gold-covered chocolate coins, and Jesse Palmer challenges the four remaining bakers to give the classic treat a twist by incorporating candied orange, espresso beans, smoked salt or toasted coconut.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Christmas Day Delights
programme.desc: Nothing beats waking up to the smell of a holiday brunch, so Jesse Palmer challenges the three remaining bakers to make a Christmas morning brunch using the classic holiday flavours of gingerbread, cinnamon and eggnog.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Santa for Bob / Snowman Secret Service
programme.desc: When Bob asks Bingo and Rolly to protect a snowman he’s building, the pugs make it their mission to keep their new snowy friend as cool as possible.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Land of the Rising Pup / ARF-CHOO
programme.desc: The pups travel to Japan to get help from the local snow monkeys and bring back snow to save Bob's ski trip.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Movie: Santa Hunters
programme.desc: One Christmas, Alex receives a present from his uncle Charlie - Santa's very own pipe. He tries to share his evidence with the world but is only met by disbelievers. Alex knows Santa is real and heads out on a mission to prove it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Fairy Beginning
programme.desc: When Jorgen discovers that Cosmo never graduated from the Fairy Academy, he threatens to take away his job as a Fairy Godparent. To solve the mystery of what happened, the gang looks through Cosmo's memories of his teenage years.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Lights, Camera, Adam/ A Case of Diary-Uh
programme.desc: Timmy lands the role of Cleft, the Boy Chin Wonder; Timmy uses Vickie's diary for revenge.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crocker Shocker/ Super Zero
programme.desc: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies; Cosmo becomes a superhero.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Warped/ Alien
programme.desc: A boy controls a portal with the help of his friends and a monster.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chip Off the Old Chip/ Snow Bound
programme.desc: Timmy feels his voice won't work in a school play; Timmy and Vicki end up in an avalanche.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Boss of Me/ He Poofs, He Scores
programme.desc: Dad takes Timmy to his office on Bring Your Kids to Work Day. Also, Timmy is talented at soccer.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crime Wave/ Odd Ball
programme.desc: Timmy leaves his favourite comic book by the tub; Timmy becomes a ball boy.

programme.title: All That: Holiday
programme.desc: America's number one kid's sketch comedy show returns with new and familiar faces.

programme.title: All That
programme.desc: Bed, Bath and Beyoncé is back with holiday home essentials. Tyga orders at Coffee Coffee Coffee.

programme.title: The Loud House: Absent Minded/ Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn the junior administrator job, but doesn't want to give up the perks that come along with it. When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Read Aloud/ Not a Loud
programme.desc: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library, but Lola refuses to participate. When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 34
programme.desc: A small hole in the ship threatening the oxygen supply can only be repaired from the outside, forcing Martin to become to first kid to ever attempt a spacewalk.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roadie to Nowhere/ A Fridge Too Far
programme.desc: When food Lincoln has saved in the fridge gets taken, a territory war in the fridge ensues.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patchy the Pirate Presents the SpongeBob SquarePants Christmas Special
programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: It's Pony
programme.desc: A normal girls' life is made extraordinary by her best friend: a hilarious talking pony.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: SpongeBob's good intentions and overzealous nature create chaos in an underwater city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snowball Effect/ One Krab's Trash
programme.desc: Pat and SpongeBob play in the snow; Mr. Krabs sells trash as antiques.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Welcome to Chum Bucket/ Frankendoodle
programme.desc: Mr. Krab loses SpongeBob's fry cook contract in a bet with Plankton and SpongeBob is forced to go work at the Chum Bucket; When SpongeBob and Pat discover a pencil from the surface, they begin to draw with it and everything they draw comes to life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Kenny the Cat/ Yeti Crabs
programme.desc: SpongeBob will do anything to get to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Journey to the Center of Mikey's Mind
programme.desc: When microscopic aliens invade Mikey's mind, the Turtles have to chase them through the strange world of Mikey's subconscious.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Arena of Carnage
programme.desc: The Turtles are captured and thrown into the Triceraton Arena!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The War for Dimension X
programme.desc: The Turtles have to gain the trust of the Utrom Council to find the next piece of the Black Hole Generator.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cosmic Ocean
programme.desc: The Turtles journey through an ocean-like area of space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Trans-Dimensional Turtles
programme.desc: The Turtles are transported to another dimension, where they meet their 80's alternative-reality counterparts.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Revenge of the Triceratons
programme.desc: Donatello is feeling inferior to Fugitoid, but his intellect is put to the test when the Triceratons attack.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Evil of Dregg
programme.desc: When Raph loses his fighting mojo, he must overcome his feelings to save his brothers from certain doom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Ever-Burning Fire
programme.desc: The team must overcome impossible odds to acquire the final Black Hole Generator piece.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Very Merry Chipmas
programme.desc: Theodore is mistaken for an elf and whisked off to the North Pole to help build toys in Santa's workshop.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lost in Space...Camp/ Super Hot Chocolate
programme.desc: Superstars Alvin, Simon and Theodore take a roller coaster ride of music and laughter.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Jeanette's Secret Garden/ Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Jeanette decides to plant a garden on the school grounds, but Bocarter manages to install vending machines instead.When Alvin finds a treasure map in Miss Croner's basement, the Chipmunks set off in search of lost treasure.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: I Will Survive/ Alvin's Got a Brand New Bag
programme.desc: When Alvin gets hurt, Simon agrees to face off against Derek on a survival reality show, where there's room for only one winner. Alvin accidentally ruins Brittany's favorite new bag and must come up with a way to replace it.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dog Gone/ Turner Back Time
programme.desc: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work. Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy's family becomes rich and spoiled.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hare Raiser/ The Kale Patch Caper
programme.desc: Despite Timmy's strong warning, Chloe wishes the allegedly 'dangerous' class bunny was free. Chloe resorts to stealing when Timmy's Dad buys the only Kale Patch Kid she needs to complete her collection.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Jerk of All Trades/ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Timmy gets Jorgen fired and helps him find a new job. Sparky makes his own magic dog treats. Crocker tires to buy one million of them in order to make a wish.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Timmy's 2D House of Horror/ It's a Wishful Life
programme.desc: A lava flow threatens Vicky's house; Timmy wishes he was never born.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairy Friends and Neighbors/ Just the Two of Us
programme.desc: Timmy's parents don't have many friends; Timmy and Trixie are the last two people on Earth

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Hard Copy/ Parent Hoods
programme.desc: Wanda leaves Timmy a magic photocopier; Timmy meets a couple who look like his parents.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Return to Roblox High School
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Baljeatles/ Vanessassary Roughness
programme.desc: Baljeet signs up for rock camp and Vanessa tries to convince her dad she is responsible.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Portal Enemy
programme.desc: Megan confronts Hiro about being a vigilante and threatens to tell Chief Cruz the truth.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dead Man's Drop/ Stumped
programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Only the Loan-ly/ Roll Reversal
programme.desc: Kick borrows money from Brianna and faces her wrath when he can't pay it back.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: A Cousin Kyle Christmas/ Snow Problem
programme.desc: Kick battles an ice storm and bizarre obstacles in order to find a last minute Christmas gift for Cousin Kyle. When Kick's family gets snowed in from an avalanche, Kick goes to the extreme to rescue them before cabin fever sets in.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bad Table Manners/ Petrified!
programme.desc: Kick and Dad compete against each other in the ultimate ping-pong match to determine if Dad still reigns as 'King of Ping.'

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Hand in Hand/ Luigi Vendetta
programme.desc: Kick and Kendall accidentally get their hands stuck together by a rare cave sap and must get un-stuck without being seen. Sick of Brad's bullying, Kick hires someone to 'take care of' Brad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Pool Daze/ Live-In Wade
programme.desc: Kick leads his friends in a battle for freedom and fun when the lifeguards at the community pool force them to stay in the kiddie pool.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: K-Nein/ Bromance
programme.desc: Kick rescues an injured stray dog, but when he discovers she's a safety dog, trained to prevent accidents, Kick must decide between keeping the dog and being a daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Say Cheese/ Pinch Sitter
programme.desc: Kick and his siblings must overcome their differences to replace a picture they broke.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Crumbs!/ Stay Cool
programme.desc: Kick must keep Mom's cookies away from Dad, a relentless cookie-fiend.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Brad's Room/ Dude, Where's My Wade?
programme.desc: When Kick's room is destroyed, Dad grounds Kick and makes him move into Brad's room where he must abide by his older brother's ridiculous rules. Kick and Gunther follow clues to track down Wade when he goes missing before the safety inspector's visit.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run Away Runway/ I Scream, You Scream
programme.desc: Candace becomes a runway supermodel and the boys decide to take on the fashion world creating a clothing line that personifies summer. Then, Isabella has her tonsils removed so the boys make her the world's biggest ice cream sundae.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb Christmas Vacation!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb want to show Santa how grateful they are for the work that he does every year at Christmas time by transforming the city of Danville into a giant shimmering thank you card and building a rest stop for Santa to relax in.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: S'Winter
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dragon vs. Genesis!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Pikachu's Exciting Adventure!
Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Space Chicken/ Steak Night
programme.desc: To impress his new neighbors, Cricket attempts to launch a chicken into space. The Greens are excited to continue their traditional monthly steak dinner, but Cricket accidentally loses the steaks on the subway.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gramma's License/ Bear Trapped
programme.desc: When Gramma crashes into a parked police car, she loses her driver’s license and her confidence. Cricket Green hates bears.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gridlocked/ Mama Bird
programme.desc: Bill brings the family out to the country for a road trip, but a traffic jam halts their plans. Tilly finds a bird's nest and tries to raise the chicks as her own, but they choose Cricket.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gargoyle Gals/ Supermarket Scandal
programme.desc: To impress her new friend, Tilly claims she saw stone gargoyles come to life.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Breaking News / Cyberbullies
programme.desc: When Bill grows a huge watermelon, Cricket invites the local news to see the mega melon. Cricket stands up to the cyberbullying of three online gamers known as the Cyber Knights.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Blood Moon
programme.desc: Cricket is excited for his first Halloween in Big City, where he and Tilly expect to collect way more candy than they ever got Trick-or-Treating in the country.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.
